park_name: KI Caravan Park ~ Kingscote Tourist Park and Family Units

reviews.review_text: Great location and very friendly staff. Cabins very dated and cramped with limited cooking equipment. Excellent camp kitchen area with great BBQs and tables/ chairs.

We have just returned home after a few days on Kangaroo Island staying at the Kangaroo Island Tourist Park at Kingscote.  Such a peaceful, clean and friendly place to base yourself when visiting K I. |There was a good selection of accommodation to choose from and we were very impressed with cabin we booked.  ||Thanks Steve and Ros.... we will certainly return and be recommending your park to family and friends.

On arrival we were greeted by Ros who welcomed us to the park.  Immediately we felt relaxed and were very impressed with the cleanliness of the Laundry and Toilet/Shower amenities and the well equipped and large Camp Kitchen.

The park offers a large variety of accommodation to suit all budgets in addition to the powered and unpowered van sites.

Nothing was too much trouble for Ros & her husband Steve.  Thanks guys.... we will definitely be back.  Happy to recommend your park to other travellers.

Was a perfect spot to base yourself on KI.
Just needs a sink in the camp kitchen

Lovely caravan park - unpowered sites were spacious, toilets and showers were clean, and the undercover bbq/camp kitchen area is one of the best we’ve ever seen! Super close to town and the beach across the road was peaceful. We’d definitely stay again!!

We received such a warm and friendly welcome ftom Ros. This is a gem of a park to stay at,  spotlessly clean amenities block and large flat caravan sites. Very accommodatiing hosts. They have alot of plans of upgrading the park, and you can see how hard they have been working around the park.

hosts

This caravan park is a gem. Lots of trees and so quiet. It is located very close to Kingscote. The owners are extremely friendly and the facilities are very, very clean as just been completely renovated.
If you are into bike riding, there are fantastic tracks leading from the park in both directions to explore.
We will definitely be back to stay here !

Absolutely recommend. We stayed in the basic cottage, it met our needs perfectly. Clean amenities, hot showers, little playground, all  basic appliances to cook meals, tea and coffee supplies. Great value. Incredible camp kitchen - I've been to 50+ caravan parks and this kitchen is in the top 3. Incredible location - beach across the road, central base to explore the Island. We are already planning our next trip! Ros was so lovely and welcoming, we can't wait to come back.

We just recently stayed here on our family holiday and the owners of this caravan park are just beautiful, friendly, knowledgeable and just genuinely lovely people. They would walk through the park at nights talking with guests, a real homely feeling. The cabins were a little older but that did not matter, the rooms were still very equipped with all the essentials and very comfortable. Camp kitchen neat and tidy and plenty of seating. Affordable accommodation for Kanagaroo Island. The park is right on the beach, you could hear the lovely waves crashing through the night. If you are after a genuine honest place to stay with friendly hard-working owners who enjoy making your holiday stay a good one, this is the place to stay!
We stayed here for a week as our base to explore the island. Such great owners, very friendly and helpful. I highly recommend this place to stay.

Great position. 5 mins drive from the town centre but 2 minutes from the walking beach.|Easy drive to all the wineries, breweries and walks.|Big sites, exceptionally clean amenities and camp kitchen. Super dog friendly.|Management were so helpful and friendly.|Would recommend people to stay.

This small caravan park is in a great location as a base for exploring K.I.  We stayed in a powered site and the price was reasonable, and it would have been even cheaper if it’s wasn’t  Easter time. The sites are large enough that you don’t feel squashed in and grass makes it better, especially if it rains.  ||Ros & Steve are lovely hosts, going out of their way to improve the park. Amenities are clean, showers hot and there is an amazing camp kitchen. ||Would definitely recommend a stay in this friendly, small park.

We spent a wonderful 6 months at this caravan park and cannot recommend it enough. Steve and Ros are fantastic hosts who have dedicated themselves to elevating the guest experience since they recently purchased the property. The improvements are visible everywhere; the facilities are consistently clean and provide a great social hub to meet fellow travellers. The entire team shares Steve and Ros’s warm and welcoming and ready to help attitude. The sites are very spacious, offering plenty of room to park your vehicle. We also really appreciated that the park is pet-friendly and provides reliable Wi-Fi. What makes this place unique is the balance between convenience and nature. You are only 5 minutes from the town centre, yet it feels like a secluded retreat. With the beach just a 1-minute walk away, the sunrises are simply breathtaking. A must-stay for anyone visiting Kangaroo Island! Thank you so much Steve and Ros, you are an inspiration ❤️
We were camped on a powered site of sufficient size for our purpose. The amenities block were clean and aseptically pleasing. Showers had good pressure and constant hot water.
Beautiful little park. Has lovely, clean amenities and the baby bath was fantastic for our 4yo who has an aversion to showers!

Très bien situé, emplacement vraiment idéal pour découvrir le secteur facilement. L’ensemble est simple mais efficace, avec tout le nécessaire pour passer un bon séjour. Quelques petits points perfectibles sur les équipements, mais rien de bloquant. Bon compromis global.

We had a great time staying with our caravan at KI Caravan Park. It is a little park but the sites were roomy, facilities were clean and had everything we needed and it was a good staging ground for exploring Kangaroo Island. The new hosts are lovely too.

Exceptionally helpful and friendly service and a great location. Stayed in a cabin and Ros was delightful. Came to the rescue in a crisis when other previously booked accommodation on KI was awful. Cabins were vintage but very clean and comfortable. Kitchen area was great and location perfect.

Out of the way park
Lovely hosts.
Close to beach and town.

I had a 9 day stay. Powered site for my rooftop tent. I have stayed at park many times before. Steve and Ros , new owners continue to work hard on upgrading the facilities and ammenities at this accommodation park. Their efforts are obvious to see. Cabin upgrades, very clean and well maintained ammenities block, well equipped camp kitchen. This park is a tranquil,  peaceful place, situated 50 meters from beach.  Walking/cycling path along coastline is about 3km to main shopping centre at Kingscote. Kingscote has impressive Drakes supermarket, range of eating options and services for most other needs. I could recommend this park for short and longer stay. Bryan

Location is excellent with great access to the beach and great views from the track on the walk into town. |Great facilities in the park.|The cabin was clean and had everything we needed.|Staff couldn’t have been more helpful and friendly.|Great holiday and well priced.|Will be back😊
We spent 5 nights here and all was perfect, the owners are lovely and helpful, all the facilities were very clean ! Nice and quiet moment !

We recently stayed in our caravan on a powered site and loved our time there. Close to all the KI has to offer with a real peaceful vibe.  The new managers have made a heap of improvements to the facilities and sites. Thanks again...

We stopped at one of the basic rooms. It was great value for money, exceptionally clean, had everything we needed.
Owners are lovely people who go out of their way to help you.
Good base for island day tripping.  Quiet. Nice outdoor area.  Clean amenities. Walking track at rear into town along beach. Easy ride.  Stayed 5 nights.  Would def. stay again
This is a really nice park, lovely lady in the office, moved us to a bigger spot when she saw our motorhome, so we could have enough space. Very welcoming, great amenities, very clean. Pet Friendly.
Great spot right by the sea. Super friendly staff and really appreciated the late checkout — made things easy. Facilities were clean and the big kitchen was a bonus. Would definitely stay again 👍
Clean facilities, best common facility. Good camp ground and friendly host.

We had 4 nights in a cabin. Comfortable with everything you need. Steve and Ros were helpful and friendly. They are working hard to improve the park which has great potential.
Ideal spot to explore the island.
Very good amenities! Everything looks brand new.

We stayed for five nights at Kingscote Tourist Park

We had a great stay and would recommend it to anyone visiting Kangaroo Island

The park caters for caravans, campers tents etc. it also has on site cabins.
KTP is centrally located to tourist attractions and has facilities nearby including restaurants, grocer and fuel

The manager, Ros, was really helpful  and  provided information when we had a few quick queries.

The toilet and showers had all been recently renovated and were very clean.

The camp kitchen was spot on. It has a cafe like atmosphere in a nice garden setting. It was clean and well fitted out with BBQ microwave, fridges etc. It had lots of tables and seating and was clean and tidy and a pleasant place to sit and dine.

We stayed in family unit which was basic but had everything we needed and was very clean and tidy. |The staff were very welcoming and very helpful|The park is very well situated for the islands highlights and is right on the beachfront.

Steve & Ros were very welcoming & friendly from the moment I called up to make an enquiry if there was anything available for us being in a Motorhome.
Great location & very well maintained park
Nice level ground for our Motorhome
The park is very neat & clean
Wonderful camp kitchen facilities
Amenities & laundry were very clean
We had a lovely stay & i would highly recommend!

We spent 9 nights here with our 2 young children and our 2 dogs.

We had the most relaxing and lovely time exploring the area and the whole Kangaroo Island.

The park is quiet and well equipped. Clean amenities and flat sites with plenty of shade.

Highly recommend!

We stayed for 9 nights with our 3 dogs and had the most peaceful and relaxed holiday possible.  The powered camper trailer site was flat and and shady with the amenities very clean and accessible.  We loved the position as it allowed us some lovely walks along the beachfront to meet the wildlife.  Ros and Steve were so very eager to assist in any way.  If the cost of the ferry was less we would be regular visitors as it truly is a wonderful place to visit, so much to see and do.  Thankyou for a terrific time.

Great accomodation perfect for a family planning to spend some time on the Island.
Thanks for the hosts that gave us a warm welcome that made our stay special.

We stayed as two families on the powered sites with caravans. Absolutely amazing stuff. I’m very clean and well kept facilities and overall area of the park.

Amazing location as we did a lot of day trips out and around throughout the entire island and we found of a very well situated caravan park to make That easy with the kids, especially being so close to the shops when needed.

Definitely will be coming back to stay at this park on our next return, hopefully in the future.
Peaceful park full of wildlife. One minute walk from beach and convenient kitchen, toilets and showers for everyone to use.
Basic but clean and well located with friendly staff.

Had a great five night stay at Kingscote Tourist Park with family, staying in one of the cabins.

Location
• Walking distance to the beach. Ideal for morning and evening walks
• Directly beside the bike trail to Kingscote. Very convenient
• Central base to explore Kangaroo Island. Close to attractions and restaurants

Wildlife and surroundings
• Koala spotted near the cabin
• Wallabies around the park
• Plenty of birdlife. Felt calm and close to nature

Facilities
• Cabins were comfortable and well placed
• Camp toilets were clean and well maintained
• Camp kitchen had all basic amenities needed for a family stay
• BBQ and camp stove / hot plates were available and in good condition

Hosts and service
• Hosts were kind, responsive, and helpful
• Support remained consistent even during the busy Christmas holiday period
• Check in and communication were smooth

Suggestion for improvement
• Clearer instructions and signage near BBQs and camp stoves / hot plates would help first time users switch them on easily

Overall experience
• Comfortable stay
• Great location
• Friendly management
• Family friendly environment

Would recommend this park, especially for families looking for a central, peaceful base on Kangaroo Island.

We stayed here for 5 nights unpowered camping and had a wonderful relaxing time. The sites are very close to each other but was fairly quiet and closest neighbours were across from us and no one on either side. Ros & Steve were super friendly and helpful and they had updated the amenities block and added more toilets and showers also which was great. The camp kitchen was well equipped and the location is excellent being close to town but not too close. We would stay here again and recommend it to anyone.  Value for money was good also.
Lovely hosts , decent facility's,  good for a quick stay
Un camping bien aménagé disposant de tous les équipements nécessaires. La gérante fut fort accueillantes et nous a donné des recommandations de lieux à visiter aux alentours

We booked a Cabin for two nights and extended for additional two - nice and clean bathrooms, cabin was perfectly matching our needs (sleeping, having coffee in the morning) and the service was very lovely. 100% recommendation. Thank you so much, Ros 😊

Great park, location is fa enough from town that it feels rural but close enough that access is easy. The park itself is well cared for, tidy and clean. Caravan sites are large and easy to access. The owners are located on site and very helpful.

The owners of this caravan park were amazing. Very friendly and helpful.
We had to cancel last minute at our first attempt to get there, but they held our booking until we could return.
Very accommodating for our caravan and two dogs (a neighbouring park advised pet friendly, but only allowed one dog). Could not fault cleanliness , thank you. Perfect stay for us.

We stayed here for 4 nights on a powered site. Really lovely feel to the place, the owners are nice and friendly and have obviously spent a lot of time, money and effort to bring up the standard to what it is today. The camp kitchen is excellent and the ablutions blocks are spotless with a new lick of paint to the older facilities. We can certainly recommend this park to anyone coming to KI

We had a total of six days (3 + 3) here. A lovely little park. Nice grassed areas to camp on. Well appointed kitchen area with barbecues, stove, hot plates, microwave etc. plus ample seating areas.  Amenities clean and well maintained. Cabins also but we did not experience.
Three k out of Kingscote with long beach a two minute walk away.
A good spot.
Very sad to see so few patrons visiting this place. Cabin all we needed for our 2 night stay. Great hot shower! Please consider a short stay. You won't be disappointed.

A great little place to stay. With a beach a short walk away, with both breathtaking Sunrises & sunsets.
Ros and Steve have done an outstanding job sincetaking charge of the park early this year. The location makes it an ideal spot to travel to all parts of K.I. I will definitely be back.

We spent 10 days here. The BBQ facilities were great for our large group to be able to sit together for dinner. It was a lovely base for a trip. The staff were very lovely and clearly take pride in their park. Thanks for having us, we will be back.

Spent 10 days as part of a large family group we had four sites all very spacious and close to the amenities.  The park facilities were clean and tidy had a wonderful kitchen bbq area and the manager was a pleasure to deal with.  Very relaxing park. Thank you.

A great park that’s so well located for short trips to all the great spots on the island. Really close to the great beaches in the area. The park was well laid out. Although the amenities were old they were really clean. Ros and Steve were lovely down to earth people that couldn’t do enough to make our stay a great experience.

Trev and Maz

Great place to stay! Amenities very clean, great location. Very friendly welcome!
We stayed in a powered site with our camper trailer so I can’t rate the rooms.
Very close to town, quick drive & cycle along the ocean path.
Would definitely stay here again 💯

Loved my stay at Kingscote caravan park. Very campervan unpowered friendly with the choice of flat, grassy wildflower big sites. Great super clean amenities. Wonderful camp kitchen and a dishwashing area, super handy. The pushbike ride into town 3km along the top of beaches is amazing. Management are really nice, helpful and friendly. Overall 5 star stay for me. Great kangaroo island stop

Our 5th stay in the park and it keeps getting better every time. Great location, a minute’s walk to the beach. Neat & clean facilities, great camp kitchen & all well laid out. New owners Ros & Steve really care and are great to deal with.

Would happily stay there again.
Great service, and well priced.

We stayed at KI caravan park for 2 nights recently and were greeted with such a warm reception! Ros and Steve are working hard upgrading the park and it’s a lovely place to stay. The camp kitchen is a treat with the log fire to keep you warm on the cold KI nights. It’s a great location to explore the island from and close to amenities: an older style park but a lovely warm welcome and a great spot! Thanks Ros and Steve.

We chose to stay at Kingscote Caravan Park as it was recommended by a fellow traveller. We weren't sorry, it was a great place to centre ourselves for exploring the island, it was clean, the owners were very accommodating, friendly and working hard around the park.

Amenities and camp kitchen were very clean, sites were a great size and close to shops, hotels and nice historical walks.

I would definitely recommend this park when visiting KI.

We camped in a tent on a powered site for 12 days in late May while our kitchen was being renovated. Though the weather was very cold and wet we found the camp kitchen with the log fire was a God send because you still feel like your outdoors yet protected from the weather. The park is surrounded by plenty of tall trees and we even saw a Koala in one of them! The facilities were clean and adequate to our needs. All the staff were friendly and efficient. Walking distance from a beach and lovely wetland walks. 5min drive to Kingscote for cafes, art galleries, historical sights and food shopping. The new owners of the park, Ros and Steve are working hard to upgrade and have already made lots of improvements. This park is going to get better and better as the years go by and we highly recommend. We would be happy to stay there again.

Ros and Steve thank you for your wonderful kindness and the lovely service you give to all your guests. I thoroughly recommend staying in Kingscote caravan park, it’s a friendly and is so close to the beautiful beach. It’s a great place to stay. We wish you both all the best as the wonderful new owners and in your bright future. Kindest regards Maxiene and Ray

Although I had a short one night stay, the experience of staying here was excellent thanks to the wonderful owners. Incredibly friendly and welcoming. Clean cabin and great facilities. Top location for a sunrise beach walk. Dog friendly. Everything was perfect. The lady owner who I booked with over the phone and was greeted by upon arrival (sorry I forgot her name) is just so lovely, warm and caring. Thank you!

Fantastic caravan park. Excellent amenities block and laundry, both super clean and well maintained. Entertaining/BBQ/camp kitchen/Happy hour area is one of the best I've seen. Two fridges, one for general use and the other for all the fish people catch. Comfortable chairs and plenty of tables.  Combustion stove in the corner kept us warm.  One of the guests asked if they could light it and the owners came straight over and lit it.  Beach is just across the road, as well as a walking/cycle path into town.  Everything you could want to do is in easy cycling distance.
Managers were very friendly and helpful.

Beautiful clean park in a great sheltered location.
Friendly family staff.
Highly recommend.

Neat, clean and well situation. Cabin a bit dated but all well maintained. Comfortable cabin with cooking utensils, cutlery, kettle. Toaster, small benchtop oven, microwave,  kettle, luxurious towels, bed linen, large TV supplied.

An amazing caravan park with excellent, clean facilities and friendly staff. We stayed here for 4 nights camping and couldn’t fault the park. It’s also in a great location to use as a base to explore the island. Would definitely recommend to friends or family visiting the island in the future. Thanks for having us team ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

A big thank you to Ros for making our stay at KI Caravan Park very memorable and enjoyable. She is such a lovely lady. We felt very welcome and comfortable during our stay. The accommodation is very clean, reasonably priced and in a very convenient location. Thank you so much!

The service was beyond fantastic.
I am a uni student and had to sit a few exams while on the road. We were allowed to check in several hours earlier and staff ensured I had wifi access and everything I needed to sit my exams, which made them (relatively) stress free.
The amenities were super clean with the camp kitchen (resort style) was one of the single best ones we've ever been in. Huge range of appliances and really nice atmosphere to sit and relax in.
The sites were spacey and the grounds very well kept.
10/10 recommend, will definitely be back
Lovely hosts and a nice atmosphere!

We had the absolute pleasure of staying at KI Caravan Park for a month while doing our academic project, and honestly, couldn’t have asked for a better experience. 🌿 The cabin we stayed in was super clean, quiet, peaceful, and felt very much like home — exactly what you need after busy days. Nature all around, the air so fresh, and only a 2-minute walk to the beach shores, which we loved so much! 🏖️ Plus, it’s just a short 6-minute drive into Kingscote town centre for all the essentials.

What made it even better was the people — Ros and Steve, the owners, are just amazing humans. So polite, kind, and genuinely caring for the park and the guests. You can really feel the love they put into the place. 🌟

This caravan park honestly ticked all the boxes for us: location, comfort, cleanliness, and that warm, welcoming vibe.
Highly highly recommend staying here if you're visiting Kangaroo Island. It’s one of those hidden gems that you’re so happy you found. 😊

Thank you again Ros and Steve for making our month so wonderful!!

Would highly recommend.  Facilities were so clean and location was perfect for our needs. Pitched a tent following the KIWT but forgot our towels.  Hosts were so gracious that they gave us freshly laundered clean fluffy towels to use..they also were prepared to accommodate our tent during a busy period.  Nothing was too much to ask for.  So very honoured to have stayed at a place where the owners genuinely care and support your accommodation needs.

We recently stayed in one of the cabins and while the caravan park itself seemed lovely and well maintained, the “2 bedroom family cabin” was disappointingly cramped for our family of four. The living/dining/kitchen room was 6 sqm max, the sofa was for 2 people only just like the dining table, the cooking unit was so inadequate, it took me nearly an hour to boil some potatoes on it. While it might suit a couple or a very small family, it definitely didn't offer the space we needed to relax and enjoy our week long holiday so we had to cut short our stay after only two nights. (No refunds were given at all, that was bummer too, but we just couldn’t stay any longer in such a small confined space)

KI Caravan Park is a gem! Ros and Steve are incredibly friendly and lovely hosts who went above and beyond to accommodate us on short notice. The property is immaculate, and the cool, homely lounge and kitchen area made our stay so comfortable. It's also super peaceful and quiet, yet conveniently close to the various shops and restaurants in Kingscote, and just a stone's throw away from the beautiful coastal walk. Highly recommend!

Normally I wouldn't review a place until I get home, but I'm so happy with the treatment I've received here. There were problems with the TV reception in the cabin that I was allocated. I was disappointed but thought that I'd have to suck it up. Steve came to me later in the day to say that a cabin that had been vacated earlier had full TV reception. Got to see the last quarter of the Geelong/hawthorn game. Sometimes a business opportunity arises with surprises/shocks. Good luck 👍.  You're on the right track.🤩

We recently stayed at the KI caravan park at Brownlow. We spent six days there in a lovely little cabin. Even before we arrived our hosts were amazing. Ros was so helpful, answering questions, sorting concerns. When we arrived and met our hosts they were friendly and welcoming. Or cabin was beautifully clean and comfortable. The bed was great (I have a bad back so I always appreciate a good bed) close to the beach, cycling and walking tracks. Close to Kingscote but just enough away that nights were quiet and not disturbed by traffic noise. Quick trip to the best coffee ever at the Cactus cafe!! We will be back. Thanks Ros and Steve for keeping up such a lovely park.

In February on the weekend of the races, I camped here. Very clean toilets and showers and kitchen areas. My site was very close to these blocks, so that was very cool. I stayed for 3 nights and had a great time.
Last weekend, 11th of April, My Mum and I stayed in one of the self contained units' for 3 nights. We were over for a wake/celebration of life ❤ Very clean and tidy, spacious and comfortable.  A walk across the road and the beach is right there and so peaceful on both occasions. The price is reasonable for either a site or unit. I would definitely stay again 😃
Alison LOMMAN

My family and I stayed 5 nights camping in our tent and we thoroughly enjoyed our stay. Camp kitchen was spacious, comfortable, clean and had everything we needed (including separate kitchen sink for washing dishes). Toilets were also clean.
And all amenities were very close.
The park was very chilled our whole time and made for a great base to explore beautiful KI.

Such a lovely, quiet park. The sites are huge, easy to park on and the facilities are great. The new owners are delightful and so accommodating. The park is practically on the beach. Such a lovely walk.

Small older park under new management, amenities were older but spotless. Owners were busy tidying up the park which is in a great location for exploring the whole island. Close to great eateries and things to do.

This was a perfect place to base ourselves for 5 days exploring the island.
The new owners are simply wonderful and can’t do enough for you. The amenities block was spotless, it’s 20 metres from the beach and quiet and shared amongst the trees.
We even got to se a koala in the trees near our van.
It was exceptionally helpful to get Ros to also book our ferry rides for us. Don’t book any accommodation on the island without first booking the feeey ride, especially if you have a can. Ros will take care of all that for you.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ A Fantastic Stay at KI Caravan Park!

I had an absolutely wonderful time at KI Caravan Park! From the moment I arrived, Ros and Steve were incredibly welcoming and went out of their way to accommodate me. I originally planned to stay just a few nights, but the peaceful, relaxed atmosphere and beautiful beachfront location convinced me to extend my stay to a week and a half—and they made the process effortless.

The park is in an amazing spot, right by the ocean, with a great beach for walking and unwinding. The overall vibe was calm and friendly, with no dramas, just a laid-back and enjoyable experience.

I will definitely be back and highly recommend KI Caravan Park to anyone looking for a great place to stay on Kangaroo Island. If you’re considering it, don’t hesitate—you’ll love it!

I just stayed here as a solo female in an unpowered campsite. I can honestly say this was one of the best camping experiences I’ve had on a commercial site. I had a couple of requests during my stay which were met with helpfulness and understanding.
The facilities are great and well maintained. The site was quiet so great to get a good nights sleep.
I would like to say a big thank you to management and heartily recommend to others wondering where to stay.
Caravan Park is well located, close to town centre. Camp kitchen and dining area is great. Amenities are clean and well equipped. Enjoyed our stay.

Great place to stay, so close to the beach, Ros was lovely and very accommodating gave my grandson a free icecream for his birthday and sang him a lovely song.... highly recommend this pet friendly park 👌 ✅️

We stayed for 12 nights in our caravan and could not have been more impressed with the hospitality, location and  friendliness of the owners. Very clean facilities. We will be back could not recommend this park enough. Thanks Ros

I stayed in one of the 2 br cabins here for a couple of nights.  I have only given it 4 stars as it is a little tired, HOWEVER, it was comfortable, clean and a great price plus very close to Kingscote and had everything we needed.  Ros and Steve have only recently taken over this park and I know it is a work in progress - I certainly have no complaints.  Ros was fabulous to deal with from first booking through to staying here.  The outside bbq/lounge/camp kitchen area is amazing - one of the best and most welcoming I've seen.  I don't usually use  these spaces when staying in a cabin but it was so enticing that I took my cuppa and book over to relax.
I didn't check out the other communal spaces but my friend assured me that they were equally clean and well-appointed.
I am sure that under this new management, the CP will go from strength to strength and I look forward to returning.

We spent one night in our Campervan. The sites are reasonably sized. Facilities are clean and well maintained.

It is my understanding that there was a change of management and it is visible that they successfully try to catch up with the facilities. They have a very cosy camp kitchen with BBQ, oven and hot plates. Ample room to sit and eat.

There is a separate dish washing station away from the camp kitchen, which I personally like. This way people aren't in each other's space.

The owner couple is very nice and makes you feel welcome. This Caravan Park is finally rescued and heading the right direction.

Ros, the owner could’ve have been more helpful. We had an unpowered caravan site and it was grassy and level. The amenities were spotless.
Couldn’t have been made more welcome! Well done Ros. 😊
Great van park in good location for exploring Kangaroo Island. Established trees and gardens. Good laundry facilities and BBQ. Sparkling bathrooms
We would like to thank Ros & Steve for the work they are doing to upgrade the park. Good sized sites, very clean amenities, camp kitchen, laundry etc, well done & good luck.

This is set on the edge of town  in pleasant bushland with the beach only metres away.  It is an older caravan park with new owners who are very helpful and pleasant to deal with.

There are plenty of trees and shade.  For tents be aware the soil is a little loose but my screw pegs held well enough in strong wind.

The kitchen/BBQ area is fine.  The toilet/shower facilities are older but clean and fine, and there are a couple of modern donga-style facilities as well.

There are very occasionally electrical brownouts. They only last a minute or two but will have the effect of resetting your equipment.  It's a little disconcerting on the CPAP machine!  This is a KI feature apparently and not the CP's.

I had a very pleasant week here, so much so I extended by a few days.  I recommend it.

Our first time on Kangaroo Island. We had heard that this CP was under new management and we thought we would give it a go. We made a really good decision. We are very happy with our stay.  We felt welcome from the minute we walked into the office and spoke to Ros. The park is situated next to the beach. The camp kitchen is huge with plenty of seating. The amenities are a bit dated, but extremely clean. It is a work in progress. We would definitely stay here if we visit Kangaroo Island again.. Thank you, making our KI stay happy and memorable.
Ps.The park is situated close to everything.

A nice caravan park with lovely old trees. It has new owners and they are very friendly and helpful. The amenities are relatively new and in good condition. Because of the number of trees, some sites are a bit tight to back into, but the owners try to match van/trailer size with an appropriate site. I would encourage the new owners to install more drainage points for waste water, but on the other hand, the ground is sandy so water soaks away quickly.

Great little park on the best island in the world.  Fabulous location. Support it please or else we'll lose the last remaining family tourist park in the area. Has all the basics, humble yes but best value park on the island. The owners did all they could to make our  booking and stay unforgettably enjoyable experience.
We spent a comfortable night at this park. Very nice hosts, good bbq and kitchen facilities. Clean bathrooms. Close access to the beach

Very Happy to have found this caravan park in Kingscote. Very lovely new owners who are doing a great job. Very friendly and helpful. Stayed in a 2 bedroom family unit with air conditioner and ensuite. Very comfortable. Everything was very clean, bed was comfortable. Park had a great area with bbqs and tables to sit and enjoy. Laundry and bathrooms were clean.
Not far from Kingscote fishing pier, Island beehive, local supermarket and a short drive to the ferry.

We stayed at KI Caravan Park for 5 nights and enjoyed the facilities, location and hospitality. Steve and Ross have recently taken over this park and are wonderful hosts, who were helpful and full of local knowledge. This park is in a great quiet location, and a 2min walk to the beach. We found it a good place to be based while exploring all the attractions of the island. I would definitely stay again.

This caravan park has a lovely friendly feeling and it is well situated to enjoy KI. We especially enjoyed being so close to the dog friendly beach. It is also nicely treed and very quiet. We found basing ourselves in Kingscote for our 8 days suited us very well. Can’t wait to come back!

We have had a wonderful three nights here at Kingscote. We were so grateful to Ros who allowed us to move to a grassy patch to set up our tents. The area has lots of trees and shady in most of the spots.The bbq/kitchen area is well equipped with dining tables, chairs and cooking utensils. The toilets and showers are clean and tidy. We would definitely come and stay here again when visiting KI. Highly recommended.

Lovely quiet caravan park
The owners are very accommodating and friendly
They have a fully equipped camp kitchen with designated cleaning washing area

We stayed for 3 nights at the caravan park and loved our time there and on KI. The cabins were clean, neat and cosy, and Ros and the team were super accomodating. Best of all they are so dog friendly and a short walk from the beach!

After our first night elsewhere on Kangaroo Island on a site that wasn't suitable for us, we contacted Ros and Steve who happily showed us the available sites in their lovely park. We were so pleased they could offer us a powered site and thoroughly enjoyed our stay at KI Caravan Park. It has everything you need for a holiday on the stunning Kangaroo Island! The Camp Kitchen area is one of the best we have ever seen and used. Staff were very friendly and helpful with all amenities very clean and well presented. It was easy to see the effort that Ros and Steve have made in the short time they have been at the park! We really  hope to return sometime.

Stayed in powered site for 5 days. 20/2/2025 to 25/02/2025. Checkin was easy. Ros was extremely helpful. Steve is hard working and the park is a great place to stay. Nice quiet area, next to beach. Ammenities are superior, plenty of space. Helpful hosts. Thank you Bryan

Had a 10 night stay on a powered site and found the park to be reasonably priced and in a nice quiet location with clean upgraded facilities. Staff were friendly and helpful. Will certainly stay here again should I visit KI again.

We stayed 3 nights and loved it! We stayed in a cabin which was clean and tidy and had everything we needed.
The park itself was great, staff were super friendly and helpful. The huge camp kitchen was fantastic, had a nice tropical feel to it. Bathrooms clean, kids enjoyed the playground despite it being basic. Koalas in the trees. A great place to base yourself for day trips. The new owners have done a great job improving the park!
Good location, nice facilities

We really enjoyed our stay here. We had an unpowered site. There was the perfect amount of sun on our pitch but also trees to provide shade. The new owners are friendly and helpful and you can see they are working hard to make improvements to the caravan park. The amenities were clean and the kitchen/BBQ/lounge area was spacious and had what you might need - fridge, freezer, kettle, toaster, BBQ etc.

Spent seven nights in a tent on a powered site.The park is not within walking distance of Kingscote but only a five minute drive
The  ammenities are clean and acceptable although at any busy time you may have to wait your turn
Kitchen seemed to be busy, it as all the essentials you need
The new Owners have a lot of work ahead but they are slowly making progress to make this a great site Good luck for the future cheers
Bob&Jane Ashton
Staff were very friendly and accommodating.  Rooms were aged and need a deep dive clean but park amenities were great and clean.  Close to beach and lovely park.
Rating should be straight 5 stars, great camp site, definitely will be back again 🔜

Great place and super friendly owners.
Highly recommended! 😍

Great camp site 3 minutes drive from the Kingscote. Stayed for 2 nights and absolutely loved it🤩
New management doing fantastic jobs, all the facilities are either new or refurbished, clean and safe environment.
Highly recommended 🔝 ⭐️
It was our first camping experience, and we decided to stay for a couple of nights here, and we absolutely loved it. Everything was clean and well organised. Keep up with the good work!

I have been working at KI for 3 months or so and stayed at this caravan park. The park is close to the beach and is nice and quiet. Overall enjoyed my stay and will be back there at some stage this year. We look forward to seeing what improvements there have done.
Nice complex with great amenities, right next to a walking trail and the beach. Rooms and clean and comfortable. Owners are warm and helpful.

The hosts were fantastic, very accommodating and helpful.

The camp is in a great spot on the island, very central to all the attractions and the main town with supermarket and the swimming rock pool.

We will be back!

We had an enjoyable camping stay for 6 nights at Christmas time. The location was great for exploring the Island and close to beaches and Kingscote for shopping. The amenities were clean and newly spruced up with new fittings and the camp kitchen was well appointed and a relaxing place to be at the end of the day. The park owners were very helpful and welcoming and doing a great job. Kaye and Ian
We had a lovely stay in our van, the amenities were clean and the park was well situated for us to be able to access all the activities and experiences that KI has to offer.
Very conveniently located . We really enjoyed our 4 nights stay at the cabins. Wonderful place .
Stayed for one week early December. Was a fantastic stay...great location...and the new owners were exceptionally friendly and helpful. Regards Peter and Baden (Kangarilla)

I have come back here 3 times now.  The new owners are friendly and super helpful .   In just the time l have been going there, they have improved the park already.  Amenites were kept clean...l would recommend staying here anytime
$7 showers for those who aren’t staying there. Absolutely lovely staff who are super kind.
A great place, simple but very clean and a great hospitality. Rose was amazing with all of us!

If you want a good, value-for-money alternative to hugely expensive AirBnB 'eco-resort' style places, or motels, we recommend this place.  It is in Brownlow, close to the amenities of Kingscote.

Importantly, it is a caravan/holiday park, so leave your 4 star hotel expectations at home and enjoy a typical Aussie holiday park atmosphere with a great communal camp kitchen.

We had a 2-bed cabin for 4 nights over Christmas.  There was a small cleaning issue which we fixed ourselves.  It is undoubtedly compact - think of a large 2-bed caravan without wheels - but the beds were comfortable, the bathroom functional, and the family area big enough for three adults.

Ros was super helpful and friendly.  We would certainly stay here again if we come back to KI.
Very accommodating, made it easy to arrive late for one night, small and newly refurbished amenities that were clean

Ros and Steve the owners of this park are delightful and enthusiastic. They purchased the park 2 months ago (reviewed 22 nov 2024)
from the previous owner of 16 years. They have a lot of plans and have hit the decks running fixing this older style park, which had been rundown. Lots of grass and large trees, spacious vibes. Old fishing shacks they plan to do up. Standard cabins and open studio cabins. Ros believes this accommodation would be good for schools.
Haven't seen the resident koala yet but the owners will let you know.
Could be a good place in winter too because the central kitchen lounge although open on 2 sides has a koonara style heater with plenty of firewood to run it.
The owners are very friendly and attentive, the place has everything you need

Recently had the pleasure of staying at this park for 5 nights on a powered site.
Short walk to the beach, our dog loved these twice daily trips.
Wonderful central location for all the areas we wanted to explore on the island. Only 3k from the town which had a great supermarket, cafes and pub. We also attended the local park run.
You can see the time and effort the new owners are putting into the park and I’m sure this will become more and more a much sort after location.
Cheryl & Glen

We recommend all campers to stay at the Brownlow Caravan Park at Kingscote, with clean ammenities, cheap accommodation and is close to the beach 🏖️ we had stayed there for 15 days we were amazed how much the new managers had welcomed us. Good luck guys with your new adventure. PS enjoy the squid 🦑

We highly recommend this park. Lovely welcoming new mangers and they are doing a fantastic job. We were in a van with great grassy site lots of trees full of birds with different calls which was lovely to wake up to. Town water is a bonus. Fantastic well equipped sheltered camp kitchen. Close and easy access to the beach for your morning walk. Thank you for a terrific stay.Booked one night stayed 4 , location being ideal to tour around. The 2 Urbans from Queensland.

New owners. Warm and friendly owners. Lovely camp kitchen/lounge area. Had a powered site. No road noise.
Great location near beach.
More time needed to enjoy the area.

Great central location for exploring the island and a short stroll to the beach. We stayed in an unpowered site which backed on to a bushy area with many birds, some wallabies and a koala. Park was very quiet and facilities have been recently updated and felt very clean. You can clearly see the effort the new owners are putting in to renew the place, well done!
Friendly and accommodating proprietors! Great beach for walks. Excellent facilities.
Lovely park, clean and tidy. Staff very welcoming, helpful and friendly. Great location as a base for exploring the central and eastern parts of the Island.

I love that place my dad's gonna work there and where not that far away it's in Brownlow and I live in Brownlow I just tested it out and rooms 3 stars service I don't always like it so two stars location is fine for me as I said Brownlow location 5 stars
Very friendly staff, very new utilities, very good environment. Quite and perfect place for camping
Stayed in a self contained unit 4 days, couldn't  wait to move on, lots of paintwork to cover faults, this place was a dump and I paid top dollar, Never again.
Great place to stay for a quick trip away. Friendly staff. Clean, self-contained cabins. Kid friendly and close walk to the beach.
Bloody awsome spot 100mtrs from the beach,  awsome bbq area 👌👌 an the manager is also lovely,  definitely recommended.

We stayed on a Powered Site for 7 nights
Very quiet at the park as we are here in May
Helen is so lovely and helpful
Showers and toilets always clean
Helen came over to our site to tell our kids about a Koala that had climbed into the tree near the front Office! Was amazing to see one so low down during the day!
Great location, great prices
If we ever come back to the island we will be sure to come stay here again
Great park with very clean amenities and friendly staff! Highly recommend!!!

This is a great caravan park…. Great reception accomodating and helpful operators, this park has unique shower cabins and toilet facilities spotlessly Clean and soo central to amenities including the Best eating venues and sightseeing places coupled with safety ….Family friendly

This park holds true to its refund policy regardless of unforeseen circumstances so beware when booking.
Unfortunately we never got the pleasure of staying at this park as my husband had a severe medical episode three days prior to our holiday.  I never wanted a refund,  just to reschedule our booking and would’ve supplied a Medical certificate as proof. Nope! Peak season and they kept all our money.  Luckily the ferry was more understanding and  rescheduled our booking for a year.

In response - I did ask for a refund via email the day of my husband’s hospitalisation in a panic. After the ferry rescheduled my booking, I phoned the park to see if I could do the same. I spoke  to a male who informed me verbally that it was peak season and I couldn’t re book as they would lose money but would offer a refund if they could rebook my site.  I don’t know whether they did or didn’t rebook my site?
Great for camping, has a good vibe and most of the time is clean
Clean facilities and a lovely place.

Came here a couple weeks ago to see some friends for a week and although it looks nice of a place just try to lay on a bed after checking in, I did this and immediately noticed springs are uncompressed and noticeable through nearly anything. The only way you could possibly sleep is either on the couch or with multiple blankets to make space between you and the mattress. Just to add to the poor quality hot water tap fell apart management wasn't around at all so had to attempt to fix, that's when a different tap although not touched at all started allowing water to go through even when fully turned off (both taps were forced into off). If I had to say coming here was a good idea it wouldn't be possible, especially with the beach looking atrocious being named a "culture beach" for what it is.

We had such a nice time visiting Kangaroo Island and we couldn’t have chosen a better place to stay. Nice location, spotless cabins/amenities, shops are pretty close and lots of wild life around. Thanks to the owners Con & Helen for your hospitality!!!
Staff were rude, rooms are disgusting. Wouldn't recommend at all.

Stayed in a powered site with our caravan. Sites are a good size. Short walk to beach and short drive to town centre/jetty. Amenities are basic but have been refreshed with coat of paint and are very clean with good showers.
Great communal camp kitchen with BBQ x 2, lots of seating and combustion heater.  Would stay again.
Great facilities, excellent staff. Very friendly and welcoming atmosphere.
